global.description: The ad features a modern design with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options for travel destinations.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a calming base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are outlined in a lighter shade, creating a modern and abstract focal point.

elements.label: Text area
elements.description: A prominent text area featuring bold, white typography that stands out against the teal background.

elements.label: Booking options text
elements.description: The text reads 'destinations await Flexible booking options' in a clean, modern font, centered and easy to read.

elements.label: Dream headline
elements.description: The word 'Dream' is displayed in a large, bold font, capturing attention with its prominent placement.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' appears in a simple, modern font at the top left, subtly integrated into the design.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A small, rounded button with the text 'Order now' in a contrasting color, inviting immediate action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, flexible booking options, travel destinations
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the center, the main subject shapes are in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: destinations await Flexible booking options, Dream, CloudRoute, Order now, SALE
